title: Implement procedures for calving
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Implement procedures for calving demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for calving

pcs.text: Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to address risks and biosecurity hazards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to address risks and biosecurity hazards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to address risks and biosecurity hazards.

pcs.text: Assess and monitor condition and health status of cow prior to calving
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess and monitor condition and health status of cow prior to calving?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess and monitor condition and health status of cow prior to calving.

pcs.text: Select required calving equipment, resources and materials and check for safe operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select required calving equipment, resources and materials and check for safe operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select required calving equipment, resources and materials and check for safe operation.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment applicable to task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment applicable to task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment applicable to task.

pcs.text: Graze cows at risk of calving difficulty in an area where intervention can be carried out with as little disruption as possible
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Graze cows at risk of calving difficulty in an area where intervention can be carried out with as little disruption as possible?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Graze cows at risk of calving difficulty in an area where intervention can be carried out with as little disruption as possible.

pcs.text: Check mating records and confirm anticipated calving date
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check mating records and confirm anticipated calving date?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check mating records and confirm anticipated calving date.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for calving

elements.title: Observe the calving

pcs.text: Monitor cows for signs of approaching parturition and throughout calving
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor cows for signs of approaching parturition and throughout calving?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor cows for signs of approaching parturition and throughout calving.

pcs.text: Note signs of calf malpresentation or dystocia from the rate of progress in giving birth and initial orientation of the feet and head
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Note signs of calf malpresentation or dystocia from the rate of progress in giving birth and initial orientation of the feet and head?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Note signs of calf malpresentation or dystocia from the rate of progress in giving birth and initial orientation of the feet and head.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Observe the calving

elements.title: Support calving

pcs.text: Handle calving cows calmly and put in a secure environment according to workplace animal welfare practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Handle calving cows calmly and put in a secure environment according to workplace animal welfare practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Handle calving cows calmly and put in a secure environment according to workplace animal welfare practices.

pcs.text: Clean calving equipment according to workplace hygiene procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean calving equipment according to workplace hygiene procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean calving equipment according to workplace hygiene procedures.

pcs.text: Use calving ropes and calf pulling equipment where required, without causing undue harm to female and unborn calf
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use calving ropes and calf pulling equipment where required, without causing undue harm to female and unborn calf?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use calving ropes and calf pulling equipment where required, without causing undue harm to female and unborn calf.

pcs.text: Seek specialist veterinary support where normal assistance procedures are not adequate to assist the calving
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek specialist veterinary support where normal assistance procedures are not adequate to assist the calving?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek specialist veterinary support where normal assistance procedures are not adequate to assist the calving.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Support calving

elements.title: Carry out monitoring after calf has been born

pcs.text: Check that calves have clear airways and commence breathing, and clear airways where required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check that calves have clear airways and commence breathing, and clear airways where required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check that calves have clear airways and commence breathing, and clear airways where required.

pcs.text: Allow cow to rest and encourage cow to lick the calf as an initial bonding
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Allow cow to rest and encourage cow to lick the calf as an initial bonding?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Allow cow to rest and encourage cow to lick the calf as an initial bonding.

pcs.text: Leave the placenta for cow to ingest after calving
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Leave the placenta for cow to ingest after calving?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Leave the placenta for cow to ingest after calving.

pcs.text: Maintain personal safety when monitoring calves and cows
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain personal safety when monitoring calves and cows?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain personal safety when monitoring calves and cows.

pcs.text: Clean and maintain the calving environment and facilities using appropriate hygiene procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and maintain the calving environment and facilities using appropriate hygiene procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and maintain the calving environment and facilities using appropriate hygiene procedures.

pcs.text: Clean and return equipment, resources and materials to required location
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and return equipment, resources and materials to required location?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and return equipment, resources and materials to required location.

pcs.text: Identify and report unserviceable equipment and resources according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and report unserviceable equipment and resources according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and report unserviceable equipment and resources according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Complete calving records according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete calving records according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete calving records according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Carry out monitoring after calf has been born
